fields.name: Production BOM No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production BOM number for the BOM that the production BOM line is created for.
The program copies the BOM number from the No. field of the Production BOM Header.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the BOM that the production BOM line is created for.
You can use one of the following methods to define the version code:

If you have set up a default number series for the version code you are setting up, press ENTER to have the program fill in this field with the next number in the series.


If you have set up more than one number series for this version code, click the field and select the series you want to use. The program will fill in the field with the next number in that series.


If you have not set up a number series for this version code, or if the number series has a checkmark in the Manual Nos. field, you can enter a number manually. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.


You cannot change the version code after you have confirmed it by pressing Enter.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of production BOM line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the production BOM line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item is measured, such as in pieces or tons. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity required to make an assembly item.
The program calculates the quantity according to the contents of the fields Length, Width, Depth, Weight, Calculation Type and Quantity per.
You cannot enter or have the quantity calculated directly.

fields.name: Position
fields.tooltip: Specifies the position of the component on the bill of material.

fields.name: Position 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies more exactly whether the component is to appear at a certain position in the BOM to represent a certain production process.

fields.name: Position 3
fields.tooltip: Specifies the third reference number for the component position on a bill of material, such as the alternate position number of a component on a print card.

fields.name: Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of days required to produce this item.

fields.name: Routing Link Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routing link code.

fields.name: Scrap %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item that you expect to be scrapped in the production process.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether there is a comment for this production BOM line.
To view a comment or create a new one, click the Actions icon, point to Component, and then click Comments. A window appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox. Notes follow documents when they are posted in the same way as comments.
The program automatically returns the entry to the Comment field if there is an entry in the Comments window.
You cannot edit or delete the contents of this field.. See also the Production BOM Comment Line table.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional description text.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which this production BOM is valid.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which this production BOM is no longer valid.

fields.name: Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Width
fields.tooltip: Specifies the width of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Depth
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depth of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Calculation Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to calculate the Quantity field.

fields.name: Quantity per
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required to produce the parent item.
